name: Predation Process
description: Predation Process process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A33[Prey Detection] --> B33[Stalking Approach]
    B33 --> C33[Attack Initiation]
    C33 --> D33[Capture]
    D33 --> E33[Killing]
    E33 --> F33[Handling]
    F33 --> G33[Consumption]
    G33 --> H33[Digestion]
    H33 --> I33[Energy Assimilation]
    
    style A33 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B33 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C33 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style D33 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style E33 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F33 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G33 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style H33 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style I33 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Process visualization: Predation Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology.
